panels.description: Fraction of the context window consumed by the last request's prompt (requires OLLAMA_DEBUG=1).
panels.title: Context Window Fill

panels.description: Token count of the last request's prompt (requires OLLAMA_DEBUG=1).
panels.title: Prompt Tokens

panels.description: Context window fill ratio per request over time (requires OLLAMA_DEBUG=1).
panels.title: Context Fill Over Time

panels.description: Tokens reused from the KV cache (same prefix as previous turn). Higher = more efficient (requires OLLAMA_DEBUG=1).
panels.title: KV Cache Reuse Tokens

panels.description: Hung job suspected if GPU stays above 80% utilisation for >25 minutes (1500s). Alert fires at 1500s.
panels.title: GPU High-Util Duration (Hung Job Detector)

panels.description: Time GPU has been continuously active. Rises while a job runs, drops to 0 when idle.
panels.title: Active Job Elapsed Time
